options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Larries: Beat the Larries in Chapter 5
Light World: Beat LW Dr. Fetus after collecting the 6 chapter keys
Dark World: Beat DW Dr. Fetus after collecting the 6 chapter keys
Light World Chapter 7: Beat all of Light World Chapter 7
Dark World Chapter 7: Beat all of Dark World Chapter 7
Bandage: McGuffin hunt to collect all the bandages

options.name: boss_req
options.description: How many boss keys are required to fight the boss (only affects Chapters 1-5)

options.name: lw_dr_fetus_req
options.description: How many boss keys are required to fight LW Dr. Fetus

options.name: dw_dr_fetus_req
options.description:
How many DW Dr. Fetus Keys should be required to fight DW Dr. Fetus
This setting does nothing if you do not have dark world levels enabled
If you don't have chapter 7 levels enabled, the max is 105
If you don't have chapter 6 levels enabled, the max is 100

options.name: bandages_amount
options.description:
If your goal is bandages, how many are required to goal
If there are dark world levels, there are 100 in the pool
If there are no dark world levels, there are 52 in the pool

options.name: boss_tokens
options.description:
Enable this setting if you want to put boss tokens on all the bosses to require to goal
Disable this setting if you need to collect all the chapter keys to reach your goal (this only applies if you need to beat lw/dw chapter 7)

options.name: bandages
options.description: Enables the bandage collectibles as locations.

options.name: dark_world
options.description:
If the goal is LW Dr. Fetus or LW Chapter 7, enable dark world levels
This setting will always be on if your setting is DW Dr. Fetus or DW Chapter 7

options.name: hard_chapter_levels
options.description:
Enable chapter 6/7 levels
Valid options are "6" and "7"

options.name: starting_chpt
options.description: Choose Starting Chapter

options.name: starting_char
options.description:
Choose Starting Chapter
If you start in Chapter 6, your character will be Meat Boy
If you start in Chapter 7, your character will be Bandage Girl

options.name: achievements
options.description: Puts most steam achievements in the pool

options.name: deathless_achievements
options.description: Puts all deathless achievements in the pool

options.name: speedrun_achievements
options.description:
Puts all speedrun achievements in the pool
This setting will always be off if there are no dark world levels in the pool

options.name: xmas
options.description: Puts all the xmas levels into the pool

options.name: bandage_fill
options.description:
What percentage of the multiworld should the remaining items be bandages.
This setting only works if your goal is bandages

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
